title: Wanilia
description: New textures with vanilla taste in them!
body:
## About

Wanilia is a pack that adds to the vanilla Minecraft style, with focus on consistency and aesthetic.
The pack itself was made so it doesn't require any mods to work. Everything is compatible with pure vanilla.

![Title of the texture pack](https://i.imgur.com/kr1WSdh.png)
